headline: Ford Stock Is Today’s Best Performer in S&P 500. Other Car Makers Also Move Higher.
summary: Ford Motor  stock was having quite a day Wednesday but the reason is hard to suss out.  Ford stock was the best-performing stock in the S&P 500, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  Other car stocks were moving, but not like Ford.

headline: Ford Is Up 7% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Car Stocks Like General Motors and Tesla?
summary: Shares of Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) are up roughly 7% in Wednesday morning trading, climbing to about $12.82 from a prior close of $11.99. The move is the stock’s sharpest single-day gain in weeks, and it stands out against a generally quiet automotive tape. By comparison, Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock is up 3% to around $446.70, ... Ford Is Up 7% Today: Is It Outperforming Other Car Stocks Like General Motors and Tesla?

headline: North American EV Demand Drops Sharply Despite Rising Global Sales, Iran War
